DEPT 5, JUDGE WICK, CSR BRENDA FIELDS, CLERK E.MONTI 2:45 PM C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, GREER SMITH. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED IN OPEN COURT BY DEFT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DWYER, TIMOTHY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 391 LEAVENWORTH ST. #8, SAN FRANCISCO $957.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $957.20, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT STAY TO NOV 1, 1993, 5PM; DEFT PAY $400.00 BY NOV. 1, FURTHER STAY TO NOV. 15; PAY $211.00 BY NOV. 15, STAY TO DEC. 1, 1993. DEFT PAY $211.00 BY DEC. 1, PLTF VACATE JUDG- MENT & ENTER INTO STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF NOV-01-1993 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
